text:
The commlink flickers to life, then death, as it fumbles its way through ten layers of proxy-tunneling, before finally resolving on the $rank's face. Before you can ask any questions, $heOrShe flashes $hisOrHer transponder to yours for a moment - confirming your suspicions. This is one of your covert fleets from your Spy Bureau.

"Pleasure to meet you $PlayerSirOrMadam. Op going well so far $PlayerSirOrMadam." $HeOrShe nods affirmingly. "Can't speak long - might break cover. Will refuse further connections. Good hunting."
options: cutCommLink:Nod, and cut the comm link
